title: Bahrain partners with SandboxAQ to build quantum-safe economy
summary: Official Bahrain News Agency announcement that the National Cyber Security Center (NCSC) of the Kingdom of Bahrain has entered a strategic partnership with SandboxAQ to transition the national government toward a quantum-safe economy, deploying post-quantum / quantum-safe cybersecurity across roughly 60 ministry environments in anticipation of cryptographically relevant quantum computers and 'harvest-now, decrypt-later' risk.
